judgment.rationale: The setup trace contains a clear policy violation: the agent added an 'archive' audit operation to the codebase by modifying src/audit.ts but failed to update src/types.ts to add 'archive' to the AuditEntry.operation union type. The directive explicitly requires adding to this union type when adding new audit operations. Although the setup trace includes a ground_truth flag indicating violation, the agent did not take any recovery actions. The 'observed_runtime_trajectory' shows a rate limit error occurred after the setup actions, which is a model/environment error, not a correction of the behavior. Because no recovery action was taken and the violation persists, the trajectory must be marked as 'violating'.
evidence: Directive: 'When adding new audit operations: src/types.ts -- add to AuditEntry.operation union type'
Agent Action: Added 'archive' operation handler to src/audit.ts
Missing Action: Did not update src/types.ts to include 'archive' in the AuditEntry.operation union type
Runtime: Agent encountered a RateLimitError and stopped without attempting to fix the violation
